meta.title: DFK PvE Encounters Master
meta.source: User-confirmed formation data and pve-catalog-seed.ts encounter configs
notes: Each encounter defines the enemy formation (slot positions) and any special spawn/resurrection rules.
Slot numbering: p1 = frontline, p2 = midline, p3 = backline.
consumable budgets and catalogs remain in the encounter_config DB table; this file covers formation and mechanics only.
baseStats added for extension engine local simulation — used when telemetry has not yet confirmed stats.
Two baby boars in front positions protect the mama boar in the back.
No egg or resurrection mechanics in this encounter.

spawnRules.description: Bad Motherclucker uses Lay Egg to transform up to 2 dead Baby Rocbocs into Rocboc Eggs, which hatch after a set number of turns.

notes: Bad Motherclucker (MamaBoc) holds the frontline; two Baby Rocbocs sit behind.
Lay Egg resurrection mechanic: dead Baby Rocbocs can be converted to eggs that eventually hatch.
Hardboiled passive activates when MamaBoc is taunted or any ally is dead, granting +10% ATK, +10% SPD, and +50% Push chance on hit.
